enableKaleByDefault.title: Enable Kale by default
enableKaleByDefault.description: Enable Kale automatically when opening a notebook.

autoSaveOnCompileOrRun.title: Auto-save the notebook when compiling or running
autoSaveOnCompileOrRun.description: When enabled, Kale saves the notebook automatically before compile, run, or upload without prompting. When disabled, you are asked to save if there are unsaved changes.

defaultBaseImage.title: Default base image
defaultBaseImage.description: Default container image for pipeline steps. Leave empty to use the environment variable KALE_DEFAULT_BASE_IMAGE or the python:3.12.

securityContext.title: Security Context
securityContext.description: Kubernetes security context settings for pipeline steps. These settings control how containers run in the cluster.

enabled.title: Enable Security Context
enabled.description: When enabled, applies security context to all pipeline steps.

run_as_user.title: Run As User
run_as_user.description: The UID to run containers as (default: 65534 = nobody).

run_as_group.title: Run As Group
run_as_group.description: The GID to run containers as (default: 0 = root group).

run_as_non_root.title: Run As Non-Root
run_as_non_root.description: Require containers to run as a non-root user.

outputPath.title: Pipeline output directory
outputPath.description: Relative path (from the notebook directory) where the compiled pipeline is saved. Leave empty to use the default '.kale/' directory.
